midi.title: MIDI Device
midi.description: Choose the MIDI output device used for playback and church services. The choice is stored in the browser.

synth.title: Browser synthesizer
synth.description: Settings for the built-in playback when no external MIDI device is connected.

status.idle: Not initialized yet — will load on first playback.
status.oscillator: No SoundFont available — simple oscillator fallback is active. Upload a SoundFont file in the Directus settings for a better sound.

soundfont.label: SoundFont file
soundfont.notCached: Not downloaded yet — will be fetched from the network on first playback.
soundfont.unconfigured: No SoundFont is configured in the Directus settings.
